description: Visualize financial data in a report by opening /home/ga/Documents/sales_report.odt. Create a 'Column' or 'Bar' chart using the 'Regional Revenue' table data (including headers). Set the chart title to '2024 Regional Revenue Trends', the X-Axis label to 'Region', and the Y-Axis label to 'Revenue ($M)'. Position the chart immediately below the data table without obscuring text. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/sales_report_final.odt.
